findings.description: The DSCA inspector map URL in the HTML footer appears as plain text and is not wrapped in an <a href> tag.
findings.evidence: HTML footer: "The DSCA inspector map can be found at this address: https://deq.nc.gov/media/20408/download" — the URL is a literal URL rendered as plain text without a hyperlink. The PDF also displays this URL (at the top and bottom of the page).
